title: Shantinath Jain temple, Kothara
tagline: Shantinath Jain temple, Kothara — spiritual town of Gujarat

overview.short: The Shantinath Jain temple is located in Kothara village of Kutch district, Gujarat, India.
overview.description: The Shantinath Jain temple is located in Kothara village of Kutch district, Gujarat, India. The temple is dedicated to the 16th Tirthankara Shantinatha and is an important place of pilgrimage for the followers of Jainism.

topPlaces.name: Kothara, Kutch
topPlaces.description: Kothara is a village and a Jain pilgrimage center located in Abdasa Taluka of Kutch district of Gujarat, India.

topPlaces.name: Bhanada
topPlaces.description: Bhanada is a panchayat village in Gujarat, India. Administratively it is under Abdasa Taluka, Kutch District, Gujarat.

topPlaces.name: Khirasara
topPlaces.description: Khirasara is an archaeological site belonging to the Indus Valley Civilization. This site is located in Nakhatrana Taluka of Kutch district in the western Indian state of Gujarat, on the bank of Khari river, 85 kilometres (55 mi) from Bhuj, the district headquarters.

topPlaces.name: Vinjhan
topPlaces.description: Vinzan or Vinjhan is a village in Abdasa Taluka in Kutch district of Gujarat, India.

items.note: Kothara is a village and a Jain pilgrimage center located in Abdasa Taluka of Kutch district of Gujarat, India.
Bhanada is a panchayat village in Gujarat, India. Administratively it is under Abdasa Taluka, Kutch District, Gujarat.

Khirasara is an archaeological site belonging to the Indus Valley Civilization. This site is located in Nakhatrana Taluka of Kutch district in the western Indian state of Gujarat, on the bank of Khari river, 85 kilometres (55 mi) from Bhuj, the district headquarters.
Vinzan or Vinjhan is a village in Abdasa Taluka in Kutch district of Gujarat, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shantinath Jain temple, Kothara?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shantinath Jain temple, Kothara is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shantinath Jain temple, Kothara?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jamnagar Airport (133 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (212 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shantinath Jain temple, Kothara?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shantinath Jain temple, Kothara at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shantinath Jain temple, Kothara?
faq.a: Stays in Shantinath Jain temple, Kothara start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shantinath Jain temple, Kothara?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kothara, Kutch, Bhanada, Khirasara, Vinjhan.
